Petition To Bring The Wyn Wang Leung Irrevocable Trust And Children'S Trust Under Court Supervision; For Trustee Geneyue To Account And Adhere To The
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The following related matters are called concurrently: PTR-23-306264, PES-24-307218 and PTR-25-308500.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Ann Kavanagh, Esq., for Gene Yue, Trustee/Guardian of the Estate of minors (via zoom).
Melanie Emmons Esq., for Sook-Ling Leung, Petitioner/Trustee/Guardian of the Person of Minors (in person).
Zachary McCoy as Guardian Ad Litem (via zoom).

The Court heard no objections. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant. All other matters are taken off calendar.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

Petition To Bring The Wyn Wang Leung Irrevocable Trust And Children'S Trust Under Court Supervision; For Trustee Geneyue To Account And Adhere To The
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Continued To Mar-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Bring The Wyn Wang Leung Irrevocable Trust And Children'S Trust Under Court Supervision; For Trustee Geneyue To Account And Adhere To The
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Continued To Feb-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Bring The Wyn Wang Leung Irrevocable Trust And Children'S Trust Under Court Supervision; For Trustee Geneyue To Account And Adhere To The
Off Calendar Sep-03-2025 Continued To Nov-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following related matters are called concurrently: PTR-23-306264, PES-24-307218 and PTR-25-308500.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Ann Kavanagh, Esq., for Gene Yue, Trustee/Guardian of the Estate of minors (via zoom).
Melanie Emmons Esq., for Sook-Ling Leung, Petitioner/Trustee/Guardian of the Person of Minors (in person).

Discussion was held regarding the Motion to Enforce Settlement Agreement filed in San Mateo County, that counsel oppose continuing the matters until San Mateo County reaches decision on the motion, and to Petition to bring both trust under Court supervision, and that the parties to split the cost of the Guardian ad Litem fees.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 5, 2025. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by November 7, 2025. The matter is continued to November 12, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and the Parties are to return on November 12, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Status of mediation.

The Court intends to issue a Breslin Order and appoint a Guardian ad Litem.


Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition To Bring The Wyn Wang Leung Irrevocable Trust And Children'S Trust Under Court Supervision; For Trustee Geneyue To Account And Adhere To The
